title: Through the lily pads, gently
description: Boats push lily pads aside instead of breaking them. Kind of like in our world.
body:
### Introduction
With this mod, your boat will push lily pads aside instead of breaking them.  
It's actually what a boat in our world would do. Plus the traveling experience is nicer.

### Recording
Here's an animated gif of mod in action.

![author testing the mod](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/moonfather1/through_the_lilypads_gently/fabric-1.20/.MEDIA/ezgif-5-f6583c704d.gif)


### More than meets the eye
There are a few things not included in early-development stage video:  
* support for several mod-added lily pads including lily pads that hold torches/candles/lanterns;
* falling onto lily pads moves them aside similar to boats.
* horses, etc. push lily pads like boats do.
